description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 1 stable/cache-friendly layout.

Refactor injected OM layout so durable observations, active task state, suggested response/next action, and continuation guidance are rendered in a stable deterministic structure that maps cleanly to future multi-message injection if hooks allow it.
title: Redesign OM injection into deterministic durable, active, and guidance segments
